ksa_text: Skill in evaluating AI transparency and accountability mechanisms, including assessing explainability adequacy and output explanation methods, evaluating accountability chain completeness, and designing interpretability approaches for stakeholder needs.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Workforce diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility processes are prioritized in the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks throughout the lifecycle.

top_anchors.element_label: Workforce diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility processes are prioritized in the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks throughout the lifecycle.
Knowledge of information technology (IT) risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-S-007 (AG, Skill) maps to Citizen Data Scientist scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5416 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.542, eu_ai_act=0.524, dcwf=0.407. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: weak fit domain KSA AG-S-007 with composite 0.5416 was preliminarily included, but the KSA text contains no direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency requires this to be re-examined against ANL scope.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.5416 above the weak_fit threshold of 0.52 but absence of analytics terminology in the AG domain text means the signal is framework-incidental rather than role-specific. Exclusion is more internally consistent with ANL scope definition.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include overturned. AG domain KSA with no analytics text signals at composite 0.5416 does not survive internal consistency review. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AG-domain KSA AG-S-007 (composite 0.5416) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AG domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Composite 0.5416 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AG domain KSA at composite 0.5416 is not a standard requirement for Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.5416, domain AG. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
